title: AI Location Control: Give Clients FULL Power! #shorts
summary: Cyril Imhof discusses how clients should have full control over AI operations and geographical deployment decisions. The piece emphasizes that complete control over artificial intelligence infrastructure is critical for proper client governance.
writeup: This short from Cyril Imhof argues that clients should retain full control over AI operations and over where those operations are geographically deployed. The point matters for enterprise AI governance: control over the underlying infrastructure, including edge deployment decisions, is framed as central to proper client oversight. The takeaway is that location and infrastructure choices belong with the client rather than being fixed by the provider.
